title: テンアゲ☆全サイズキャンペーン！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run into Tosen Jordan and her friend at a fast
food restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey! If it isn't Jordan's trainer! ☆ Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, for real. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You gonna join us? Like, to celebrate you two
teaming up? The more the merrier! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not so fast, Helios!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't want to be a third wheel, so...
choice_data_list: Thanks for the offer, but don't worry about me!
Thanks for the offer, but don't worry about me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Don't be shy! You're her trainer! Let's get
this party started!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Might as well give it up. Helios doesn't listen to a
word anyone says when she gets like this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wanna grab a table and order? I'm short on cash,
so I'm gonna get something cheap...

text_block_list.name: Store Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for shopping with us! Be sure to check
out our super size special! ☆ All items are the
same price no matter what size you choose!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real?! This is fire! We gotta get everything
extra large!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! I'll take a mega-size fries and drink, please!
choice_data_list: Let's not overdo it. How about a small?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! I'll take a mega-size fries and drink, please!
choice_data_list: Let's not overdo it. How about a small?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong with extra large? Chances like this
don't come around every day.
choice_data_list: Overeating will affect your race performance.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I guess I get it. It'd be lame if that
happened.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... In that case, I'm out too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hold up! Tall people need to eat more, right?
Can anyone say calcium? Let's get extra large
yogurt shakes!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, you're not gonna grow that fast! Hehe!
Hahahaha! Stop making me laugh, it hurts!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's, like, the funniest thing I've heard all day. I
can't be upset with you around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we all enjoy a moderately-sized meal.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yasss! You can be pretty fun sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Look at how big this is! I'm dying! This is
going right on Umasta!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It looks sooo good! I'm in heaven!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's eat already! ♪ Everyone knows it's the
best when it's hot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan completely fills up on the
junk food she loves so much.
